title: DLSA Darrang Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: District Legal Services Authority Darrang (DLSA Darrang)
short_info: District Legal Services Authority Darrang (DLSA Darrang) Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website darrang.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Darrang Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be admissible as per the existing rules of Government of Assam in appropriate cases.

qualification.education_qualification: Class VIII passed, Valid driving license (LMV)
qualification.details: Minimum educational qualification: Class VIII passed. Valid driving license (LMV).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://darrang.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Darrang Driver Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DLSA Darrang Driver Recruitment 2026 is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed at least Class VIII and possess a valid driving license for Light Motor Vehicles (LMV) to be eligible for the Driver post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Driver post is between 18 years and 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per Government of Assam rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Driver post will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Driver post in the District Legal Services Authority Darrang.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DLSA Darrang Driver Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Driver post includes a Driving Skill Test and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority Darrang, which is https://darrang.dcourts.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the application form.
